<?php namespace PayPalCheckoutSdk\Core; use PayPalHttp\HttpRequest; class RefreshTokenRequest extends HttpRequest { public function __construct(PayPalEnvironment $environment, $authorizationCode) { parent::__construct("/v1/identity/openidconnect/tokenservice", "POST"); $this->headers["Authorization"] = "Basic " . $environment->authorizationString(); $this->headers["Content-Type"] = "application/x-www-form-urlencoded"; $this->body = [ "grant_type" => "authorization_code", "code" => $authorizationCode ]; } }
